/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.1 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Assignment1.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Assignment1.dir/src/A1solution.cpp.o -o Assignment1  -framework OpenGL /opt/local/lib/libGLEW.dylib /opt/local/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL
